productDisplayName: Nike Men's Tennis Classic White Black Shoe
description: Lightweight and comfortable, the nike tennis Classic men's shoe is designed for the winner. With a neat, low profile design, this shoe is makes for a great indoor court game, or simply team it with jeans and t-shirts for a cool, casual look.Upper Synthetic leather upper with stitched detailing for durability, comfort, water-proofing and style Synthetic wrap around swoosh branding overlay and an extra overlay at the heel for extra midfoot and backfoot support Lace-up system for snug Fit Cotton twill laces for durability CUshioned tongue and sockliner for in-step comfort and snug fit Midsole Phylon midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protection Padded and perforated footbed for fresh and dry comfort Outsole Durable rubber outsole with herringbone pattern for maximum grip and traction Shoe careWipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine washDo not store in direct sunlight
